caption: Three regiments of different size AND density -- Spearmen (Tight), Infantry (Normal), Archers (Loose) -- box-selected and dragged into a flank line under the new default form-up mode: equal depth (space basis). Every regiment forms up to the same PHYSICAL depth rather than the same rank count, so the tightly-packed Spearmen and the loosely-spread Archers split the line differently even though neither is simply the biggest unit. See how-to-play.qmd for the other three selectable modes (☐ Menu → Form-up, or the Y key to cycle).
